23a.reason: Discussion interprets results vs other meta-analyses (Sachdeva, Hajibandeh).

23b.reason: Discusses limitations such as stocking types and duration variability.

23c.reason: Notes review did not distinguish stocking types or record intervention duration.

26.reason: Authors declare no conflicts of interest.

item_1.reason: Title identifies as systematic review and meta-analysis

item_2.reason: States objective to investigate preventive effect of elastic stockings on DVT after orthopedic surgery

item_3.reason: No explicit inclusion/exclusion criteria specified beyond RCTs on topic

item_4.reason: PubMed, Embase, Cochrane searched, from 2008 to date

item_5.reason: No risk of bias assessment method reported

item_6.reason: Describes Revman 5.3.5, random/fixed effect models, subgroup and sensitivity analyses

item_8.reason: Reports OR=0.59, 95% CI 0.34-1.03, subgroup Z-values and P-values

item_9.reason: No discussion of limitations of evidence

item_10.reason: Concludes elastic stockings prevent DVT in ankle surgery but not hip/knee; suggests combining anticoagulants
